mermaidSyntax:
sequenceDiagram
  participant A as Author
  participant E as Editor
  participant R1 as Reviewer 1
  participant R2 as Reviewer 2
  participant P as Production

  A->>E: Submit manuscript
  E->>E: Desk review
  
  alt Desk Reject
    E-->>A: Reject (desk rejection)
  else Send to Review
    par Assign Reviewers
      E->>R1: Assign manuscript
      E->>R2: Assign manuscript
    end
    
    Note over R1,R2: Review period (2-4 weeks)
    
    R1-->>E: Submit review report
    R2-->>E: Submit review report
    
    E->>E: Evaluate reports
    
    alt Accept
      E-->>A: Accept manuscript
      E->>P: Transfer to production
      P->>P: Copyediting & Typesetting
      P->>A: Send proofs
      A->>P: Approve proofs
      P->>A: Publish article
    else Minor Revisions
      E-->>A: Request minor revisions
      A->>E: Resubmit revised manuscript
      Note over A,E: Review cycle repeats
    else Major Revisions
      E-->>A: Request major revisions
      A->>E: Resubmit revised manuscript
      Note over A,E: Review cycle repeats
    else Reject
      E-->>A: Reject manuscript
    end
  end
